mapper.select: SELECT B.BATTLE_ID, B.COURSE_ID, B.USER_ID, B.WORKRECORD_ID, B.BATTLE_NAME, B.MODE, B.STATUS, B.START_DATETIME, B.END_DATETIME, B.TEAM_SIZE, B.GENDER_TYPE, C.COURSE_NAME AS COURSE_NAME, U.NICKNAME AS OWNER_NICKNAME FROM BATTLE B JOIN COURSE C ON B.COURSE_ID = C.COURSE_ID JOIN USERS U ON B.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE B.BATTLE_ID = #{battleId}

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM COURSE C WHERE C.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND C.USER_ID = #{userId} AND C.IS_PUBLIC = 1 AND ( UPPER(TRIM(C.TYPE)) = 'RUN' OR UPPER(TRIM(C.TYPE)) = 'RUNNING' OR TRIM(C.TYPE) = '러닝' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BATTLE ( COURSE_ID, USER_ID, WORKRECORD_ID, BATTLE_NAME, MODE, STATUS, START_DATETIME, END_DATETIME, TEAM_SIZE, GENDER_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{userId}, #{workRecordId}, #{battleName}, #{mode}, #{status}, #{startDatetime}, #{endDatetime}, #{teamSize}, #{genderType} )
mapper.update: UPDATE BATTLE SET COURSE_ID = #{courseId}, USER_ID = #{userId}, WORKRECORD_ID = #{workRecordId}, BATTLE_NAME = #{battleName}, MODE = #{mode}, STATUS = #{status}, START_DATETIME = #{startDatetime}, END_DATETIME = #{endDatetime}, TEAM_SIZE = #{teamSize}, GENDER_TYPE = #{genderType} WHERE BATTLE_ID = #{battleId}
mapper.select: SELECT W.WORKRECORD_ID AS workRecordId, W.USER_ID AS userId, W.COURSE_ID AS courseId, W.BATTLE_ID AS battleId, W.IS_MEASURE AS isMeasure, W.WORKRECORD_DATE AS workRecordDate, W.DISTANCE, W.MAX_SPEED, W.AVG_SPEED, W.MAX_HEARTRATE, W.AVG_HEARTRATE, W.MAX_PACE, W.AVG_PACE, W.AVG_CADENCE, W.CALORIE FROM WORKRECORD W JOIN JOIN_BATTLE JB ON JB.BATTLE_ID = W.BATTLE_ID AND JB.USER_ID = W.USER_ID WHERE W.BATTLE_ID = #{battleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WORKRECORD WHERE BATTLE_ID = #{battleId} AND IS_MEASURE = 0

SELECT WORKRECORD_ID AS workRecordId, USER_ID AS userId, COURSE_ID AS courseId, BATTLE_ID AS battleId, IS_MEASURE AS isMeasure, WORKRECORD_DATE AS workRecordDate, DISTANCE, MAX_SPEED, AVG_SPEED, MAX_HEARTRATE, AVG_HEARTRATE, MAX_PACE, AVG_PACE, AVG_CADENCE, CALORIE FROM WORKRECORD WHERE BATTLE_ID = #{battleId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_MEASURE = 0 ORDER BY WORKRECORD_ID DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT WORKRECORD_ID FROM WORKRECORD WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_MEASURE = 0 AND AVG_PACE > 0 AND DISTANCE > 0 ORDER BY WORKRECORD_ID DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT WORKRECORD_ID AS workRecordId, USER_ID AS userId, COURSE_ID AS courseId, BATTLE_ID AS battleId, IS_MEASURE AS isMeasure, WORKRECORD_DATE AS workRecordDate, DISTANCE, MAX_SPEED, AVG_SPEED, MAX_HEARTRATE, AVG_HEARTRATE, MAX_PACE, AVG_PACE, AVG_CADENCE, CALORIE FROM WORKRECORD WHERE WORKRECORD_ID = #{workRecordId}
